U.D. CASE, DEPT. 8 P/T JUDGE ROSS, RPTR. D. COSTELO, CLK. R. CONTRERAS 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. JUDGEMENT PER STIPULATION. JUDGEMENT FOR PLT. RENT AT $285.00 PER MO. TOTAL $1,995.00 COSTS 263.00. ATTY. FEES $600.00. TOTAL $2,858.06. RED CROSS HAS PAID $800.00. DEFT. HAS PAID $1,140.00 WITH MONEY ORDER. BALANCE $918.06. TO BE PAID AT $75.00 PER MONTH. BEGIN 1/5/95. RENT OF $285 PER MONTH TO BE PAID BY THE 5TH OF EACH MONTH. IF CONDITIONS NOT MET, PLTF. BY EXPART MOT. WITH 5 DAY NOTICE FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES. IF DEFT. PAYS TIMELY, THE PLTF. WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORMAN, BEVERLY NORMAN, YVETTE NORMAN, LE MONT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5 BANNEKER WAY #E, SFCA 94102 $55.00 RENT, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $263.06 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $918.06, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE CONDITIONAL STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT OR DISMISSAL AND ORDER.
